nasb.text: For the land has become defiled, therefore I have brought its punishment upon it, so the land has spewed out its inhabitants.

esv.text: and the land became unclean, so that I punished its iniquity, and the land vomited out its inhabitants.

cnv.text: 連地也被玷污，所以我追討那地的罪孽，那地就把居民吐出去。

ccb.text: 他们居住的土地也都被玷污了，所以我因他们的罪恶而惩罚那片土地，我要使那片土地吐出他们。
